nirs4all_msc.notes: External project reference; exact commit must be captured in future result metadata.

nirs4all_savitzky_golay.notes: Used for chemometrics convention checks around padding and derivative scaling.

nirs4all_kennard_stone.notes: Index-order reference for deterministic sample selection.

scipy_savgol_filter.notes: Current external-reference pin for Savitzky-Golay coefficients and convolution behavior.

pybaselines_asls.notes: Canonical external reference method; benchmark gates compare against stored output snapshots generated from this package/version.

pybaselines_airpls.notes: Canonical external reference method; benchmark gates compare against stored output snapshots generated from this package/version.

pybaselines_arpls.notes: Canonical external reference method; benchmark gates compare against stored output snapshots generated from this package/version.

numpy_svd.notes: Linear algebra reference for PCA-style diagnostics.

scipy_f_distribution.notes: Reference distribution for Hotelling T2 control limits.

workman_2018_calibration_transfer.title: A Review of Calibration Transfer Practices and Instrument Differences in Spectroscopy
workman_2018_calibration_transfer.notes: Review reference for DS, PDS, slope/bias, local centering and related calibration-transfer families.

sa_pbs_2023.title: Enhancing standardization through score-augmented projection-based calibration transfer

vsn_2020.title: VSN: variable sorting for normalization
vsn_2020.notes: Reference for data-derived weighted SNV / variable sorting normalization.

local_scatter_2026.title: Demystifying Piecewise and Localized Scatter Correction Methods
local_scatter_2026.notes: Reference for piecewise/localized SNV and MSC scatter correction.

tomasi_cow_dtw_2004.title: Correlation optimized warping and dynamic time warping as preprocessing methods for chromatographic data
tomasi_cow_dtw_2004.notes: Reference for COW and DTW alignment families.

savorani_icoshift_2010.title: icoshift: A versatile tool for the rapid alignment of 1D NMR spectra
savorani_icoshift_2010.notes: Reference for interval correlation optimized shifting.

norgaard_ipls_2000.title: Interval Partial Least-Squares Regression (iPLS): A Comparative Chemometric Study with an Example from Near-Infrared Spectroscopy

nir_variable_selection_review_2010.title: Variables selection methods in near-infrared spectroscopy
nir_variable_selection_review_2010.notes: Review reference for model-agnostic and model-based wavelength selection families.
